name: Apple Cranberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
Prepare pie crusts for a 9-inch two-crust pie. Preheat oven to 450°F.
In a large bowl, mix sugar, corn starch, and cinnamon until well combined.
In another large bowl, combine apples, cranberries, and corn syrup.
Add fruit mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until fully combined.
Pour into the pie crust-lined pan and dot with butter.
Top with the second crust. Flute edges.
Make four 4-inch slashes in the center of the crust, forming a criss-cross pattern.
Gently press the center points inward to form eight petals.
Brush the top crust with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
Reduce temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 40-45 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow to cool completely on a wire rack. Store in the refrigerator.
